zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Barber於1460年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德格亞特 廷頓時，他的父親Sir James Barbor26歲，母親Joan Byrd24歲。他和Lady Catherine de Thiesselin至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1504年9月24日在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德享年44歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Barber
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a barber, from Middle English barb(o)ur ‘barber’ (Anglo-Norman French barber, Old French barbier, from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). In the Middle Ages barbers not only cut hair and shaved beards, but also practised surgery and pulled teeth.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name from German Barbier ‘barber’ (compare 1 above).
Catalan: occupational name for a barber, barber (see 1 above).

variants.name: Barbier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Emile, Pierre, Alexandre, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Laurette, Manon, Marcel, Marcellin, Michel.
French: occupational name for a barber-surgeon (see Barber ), Old French barbier (from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’). Compare Barbe and Barbee .
German: occupational name for a barber, from Middle High German barbierer, or an occupational name for an armorer, from barbier(e) ‘metal visor (to protect the face)’.

variants.name: Berber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Salvador, Guillermo, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Luis, Adriana, Alfredo, Angelina, Armando, Carlos.
Catalan: probably a variant of   Barber  . This surname is most common in Mexico.
Turkish: occupational name from berber ‘barber’.

variants.name: Barbero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ricardo, Alvino, Ana, Angel, Arsenio, Fernando, Gustavo, Jaime, Jose, Maribel, Mario, Nenita.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Domenic, Ernani, Giulio, Italo.  French Emile, Yves.

Spanish and Italian (Piedmont): occupational name for a barber-surgeon, barbero, from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’ (from Latin barba); see also Barber . This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Barbieri
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Angelo, Vito, Rocco, Aldo, Cosmo, Dino, Domenic, Geno, Giovanna, Guido.
Italian: occupational name from barbiere ‘barber-surgeon’ (see Barber ), from Late Latin barbarius, a derivative of barba ‘beard’.

variants.name: Barbour
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: occupational name from Old French barbeor ‘barber’. Compare the English form Barber .

History: George Barbour sailed from England on the Transport in 1635. He became a freeman of Dedham, MA, in 1647 and settled eventually at Medfield. A Scottish merchant named Barbour settled in eastern VA in the latter half of the 17th century.

variants.name: Borbely
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Antal, Ferenc, Ildiko, Kalman, Laszlo, Miklos.
Hungarian (Borbély): occupational name for a barber, Hungarian borbély. See also Barber .

variants.name: Barbeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Monique, Alcide, Alphonse, Amiee, Armand, Gisele, Jean Francois, Lucien, Lucienne, Michel.
French:

from barbeau ‘barbel’, a type of fish, hence a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, or a nickname for a man with a sparse beard, the fish being distinguished by beardlike growths on either side of its mouth.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

variants.name: Nicolas
meanings: From Late Greek. See Nicholas .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Barber was born in 1460, in Great Whittington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James Barbor, was 26 and his mother, Joan Byrd, was 24. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Catherine de Thiesselin. He died on 24 September 1504, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Barber est né en 1460, à Great Whittington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Barbor, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Byrd, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Catherine de Thiesselin. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1504, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Er hatte mit Lady Catherine de Thiesselin mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. September 1504 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Catherine de Thiesselin. Morì il 24 settembre 1504, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Fressingfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Barberが1460年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドグレアト ウィッティントンで生まれた時，父Sir James Barborは26歳，母Joan Byrdは24歳であった。彼はLady Catherine de Thiesselinとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1504年9月24日にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで44歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Barber(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 그리트 휘틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Barbor(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Byrd(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Lady Catherine de Thiesselin(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 9월 24일 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Barber родился в 1460 г. в местности грит уиттингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James Barbor было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Byrd, 24. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Catherine de Thiesselin. Он умер 24 сентября 1504 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.
